site.name: Thrivea
site.title: Thrivea Status
site.tagline: Live and historical status of the Thrivea platform.

//note: Monitor targets the publicly reachable prod App host. The azurewebsites.net default host always resolves; swap to api.thrivea.com once confirmed reachable from the public internet. Dedicated single-tenant deployments are kept on separate, private status surfaces — not listed here.

components.description: Core gRPC/REST API that the Thrivea web app talks to.

components.name: Social Feed

components.name: HR & Organization

monitors.note: Pure liveness — proves the host process answers at all.
Aggregate readiness (excludes background). Plain-text today; drives all core components until the JSON writer lands.
Per-check granularity. Returns rich JSON ONLY after the backend response-writer diff is merged; until then it is treated as aggregate text and only drives Background Jobs.
